judge.comments: Semantic anchor is present, but colour and scale are wrong versus S-101/OpenCPN. Aqua Map anchoring-prohibited is not the right primary reference for this row.
judge.expected: Small magenta S-52/S-101 anchorage/obstruction anchor motif: magenta vertical shank, crossbar, and compact flukes; preserve magenta hazard/area styling.
judge.observed: Black large anchor with circular ring and rounded flukes.

symbols.name: Small magenta S-52/S-101 anchorage/obstruction anchor motif: magenta vertical shank, crossbar, and compact flukes; preserve magenta hazard/area styling.

provenance.reference_role: S-101/Aqua Map/OpenCPN visual reference; redrawn owned SVG

symbols.repair_note: Redraw from S-101/OpenCPN ACHARE02: compact magenta anchor, no black stroke, correct tiny-chart proportions.

judge.comments: Candidate reuses the wrong black point-anchor and ignores the ACHARE51 S-101/OpenCPN boundary form.
judge.expected: Boundary anchorage area symbol is a pale/magenta S-52 anchor/boundary reference, larger than ACHARE02 but still magenta and shaped like S-101 ACHARE51.
judge.observed: Same black large anchor reused from ACHARE02.

symbols.name: Boundary anchorage area symbol is a pale/magenta S-52 anchor/boundary reference, larger than ACHARE02 but still magenta and shaped like S-101 ACHARE51.

provenance.reference_role: S-101/Aqua Map/OpenCPN visual reference; redrawn owned SVG

symbols.repair_note: Redraw ACHARE51 specifically from S-101/OpenCPN, preserving magenta boundary colour and the broader anchor outline.

judge.comments: The berth ring detail exists in the source but the candidate is black, oversized, and not the S-101 berth silhouette.

symbols.repair_note: Redraw as ACHBRT07: magenta compact anchor with circular berth ring and reference-matched proportions.

judge.comments: Semantic anchor is plausible but not colour-safe or chart-standard for this row.

symbols.repair_note: Redraw ACHPNT01 as compact magenta/purple anchor point; keep it visually distinct from anchorage area variants.

judge.comments: Candidate omits the restriction semantics entirely; this is a navigation-safety failure.
judge.expected: S-101/OpenCPN ACHRES61 shows a magenta anchorage-restriction symbol with diagonal prohibition slash plus caution/other-caution mark.
judge.observed: Plain black anchor only; no prohibition slash/caution modifier.

symbols.name: S-101/OpenCPN ACHRES61 shows a magenta anchorage-restriction symbol with diagonal prohibition slash plus caution/other-caution mark.

provenance.reference_role: S-101/Aqua Map/OpenCPN visual reference; redrawn owned SVG

symbols.repair_note: Redraw with magenta anchor, diagonal restriction slash, and ACHRES61 caution modifier exactly as S-101/OpenCPN shows.

judge.comments: Candidate collapses restricted anchoring into ordinary anchoring, which is unsafe.
judge.expected: S-101/OpenCPN ACHRES71 shows magenta anchorage restriction with diagonal slash and information marker.
judge.observed: Plain black anchor only; no information/restriction modifier.

judge.comments: No local reference render was available and the candidate may be using a buoy body for a beacon symbol. Conservative fail.
judge.expected: BCNCON81 must be verified against its exact OpenCPN/S-52 reference before approval; packet metadata says BCNSPP/BOYSHP conditions, not enough to approve a buoy-body drawing.
judge.observed: Large conical buoy body filled blue/red/white stripes; no local OpenCPN reference render found.

symbols.name: BCNCON81 must be verified against its exact OpenCPN/S-52 reference before approval; packet metadata says BCNSPP/BOYSHP conditions, not enough to approve a buoy-body drawing.

provenance.reference_role: S-101/Aqua Map/OpenCPN visual reference; redrawn owned SVG

symbols.repair_note: Regenerate source reference for BCNCON81, then redraw exactly to the reference; do not approve from inferred metadata alone.
